project: Answer to EC Tender CNECT/LUX/2022/OP/0030 - LANGUAGE TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS Lot 2
title: Answer to EC Tender CNECT/LUX/2022/OP/0030 - LANGUAGE TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS Lot 2

czech_title.label: Czech title
czech_title.text: Odpoved na vyberove rizeni EK CNECT/LUX/2022/OP/0030 - JAZYKOVA TECHNOLOGICKA RESENI Polozka 2

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: This call for tenders implementing the Digital Europe programme (DIGITAL) in the field of language technologies is to achieve three specific goals:1. facilitate uptake by SMEs, NGOs, public administration, and academia of European machine translation services for websites;2. support the creation of open source European language speech recognition solutions;3. carry out market studies on language technologies and widely disseminate their results in order to foster the take-up of language technologies in Europe.This call for tenders covers: creating and promoting a set of ready-to-use open-source automated website translation solutions, creating an open-source basic speech recognition prototype solution, as well as conducting market research on language technologies and disseminating their results widely.
